changes.comment: Major release: client-side router with history and hash modes, configurable base path, and per-route middleware chains; named routes with urlFor() and navigateTo(); typed prefix params and nested route groups; programmatic navigation (navigate, back, forward, go) with replace and state options; isActive() for link state; subscribe() for reactive route change observation; link() and linkTo() DOM helpers for anchor creation; debug() for runtime route inspection; global and per-route not-found handler
